items.title: iRobot’s newest floor cleaner isn’t a robot
items.summary: iRobot just announced its first ever non-robotic floor cleaner. The $399 Roomba Electro Plus is a 5-in-1 hard-floor cleaner that combines vacuuming, mopping, and disinfecting, b...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: This startup pits dealerships against each other to bid on your used car
items.summary: Bidbus, which lets dealerships bid on used cars, has raised $15 million in a Series A round that was led by early-stage mobility fund Ibex Investors.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Foreign ownership in Swiggy goes below 50%
items.summary: This change in ownership resulting as Indian owned and controlled company (IOCC) will enable Swiggy to own inventory directly for Instamart, its quick commerce business.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
